falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes below 4,150 on any single day within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A break below the August 2024 lows would invalidate the 79% bottom pattern match, as the prior structure would be violated rather than forming a base

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 35 for 2 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained volatility expansion above the August 2024 panic levels would indicate this is not a controlled bottoming process but rather a new acute stress phase, breaking the pattern analogy

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y-2Y Treasury yield spread inverts further below -50 basis points
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Deepening inversion would signal escalating recession probability that the August 2024 bottom pattern did not embed, proving the macro regime has shifted beyond the referenced analog

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
